leadText: The Lucky Punch (Japanese: ラッキーパンチ Lucky Punch) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It boosts the critical hit ratio of a Chansey that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Chansey , or a Pokémon transformed into one, increases its critical hit ratio by two stages. In Gold, Silver , and Crystal , being transformed does not grant this benefit.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Ups critical hit ratio of Chansey . R S E Colo XD A hold item that raises Chansey 's critical-hit rate. FR LG A glove to be held by a Chansey . It raises Chansey 's critical-hit ratio. D P Pt HG SS An item to be held by Chansey . It is a pair of gloves that boosts Chansey 's critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by Chansey. It is a pair of gloves that boosts Chansey's critical-hit ratio. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by Chansey. This pair of lucky boxing gloves will boost Chansey's critical-hit ratio. S V An item to be held by Chansey. This lucky boxing glove boosts the critical-hit ratio of Chansey's moves.
